summary: Completed testing of newly added features: Categories CRUD, In-app Notifications, Attachment viewing, and Task delete functionality. Backend APIs working excellently (97.6% success rate), frontend UI functional with minor session management issues.

minor_issues.issue: Staff cannot update task status from VERIFIED to IN_PROGRESS
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - staff should not modify verified tasks

minor_issues.issue: Manager cannot delete already deleted task
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - task was already deleted by owner

ui_bugs.issue: Sessions expire quickly during testing, requiring frequent re-login
Some modal overlays intercept clicks, requiring force clicks

passed_tests: Categories CRUD - Create, Read, Update, Delete all working
Notification Bell - Shows unread count and dropdown
Notification API - Get notifications, unread count, mark read/all read
Task Delete - Working for Owner/Manager, blocked for Staff
Attachment API - Get attachments endpoint working
Authentication - All user roles login successfully
Task Management - Create, update, verify tasks working
Comments - Add and retrieve comments working
Activity Logs - Task activity tracking working
Categories UI - Page loads, search works, CRUD buttons present
Tasks UI - Page loads, displays tasks with status indicators
Task Detail UI - Tabs structure present (comments, attachments, activity)
